title: Apply for a student course “Ancient Arabia and the Origins of Islam” in Saudi-Arabia
content: The Finnish Institute in the Middle East’s autumn student course, “Ancient Arabia and the Origins of Islam,” will be held in Saudi Arabia from 16–23 October 2026. The course explores the history of ancient and Late Antique Arabia, with a particular focus on the oasis towns of the Hijaz (western Arabia). Chronologically, the course covers the period from the reign of Nabonidus (556–539 BCE) to the earliest history of Islam (610–632 CE).
